title: Saudi Arabia records over 22,000 violations, arrests thousands in one-week crackdown on residency, labour and border breaches
summary_full: Saudi Arabia's intensive crackdown on residency, labor, and border violations resulted in over 22,000 arrests in a single week. The majority of violations involved irregular residency status, with significant numbers also apprehended for attempting illegal entry. Authorities are expediting deportations and issuing stern warnings against facilitators, emphasizing strict penalties for aiding illegal activities.
